email_body:
Beste,

Met veel enthousiasme reageer ik op de vacature voor Content Marketeer bij Antenna. Uw focus op 'digital done right' en het vertalen van complexe technologie naar heldere verhalen sluit naadloos aan bij mijn ervaring.

Bij Episto schrijf ik SEO-gerichte blogcontent en beheer ik WordPress-sites, wat me een sterke basis geeft in contentcreatie en -optimalisatie. Daarnaast heb ik op mirook.com gewerkt met structured data en GEO om zichtbaarheid in AI-zoekmachines te verbeteren. Ik heb oog voor detail, werk graag zelfstandig en ben niet bang om nieuwe tools (zoals AI) te omarmen.

Ik spreek vloeiend Engels en Turks, en mijn Nederlands is B1 (met lessen). Ik woon in Zwijndrecht, dicht bij Gent, en ben beschikbaar voor 60% of 80%.

Graag licht ik mijn motivatie toe in een gesprek.

Met vriendelijke groet,

Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok

--- English version ---

Dear,

I am very enthusiastic to apply for the Content Marketeer position at Antenna. Your focus on 'digital done right' and translating complex technology into clear stories aligns perfectly with my experience.

At Episto, I write SEO-focused blog content and manage WordPress sites, giving me a strong foundation in content creation and optimization. Additionally, on mirook.com I worked with structured data and GEO to improve visibility in AI search engines. I have an eye for detail, enjoy working independently, and am not afraid to embrace new tools (such as AI).

I speak fluent English and Turkish, and my Dutch is B1 (with lessons). I live in Zwijndrecht, close to Ghent, and am available for 60% or 80%.

I would be happy to explain my motivation in a meeting.

Kind regards,

Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok
cover_letter:
Beste,

Toen ik de vacature voor Content Marketeer bij Antenna las, voelde ik meteen een klik. Uw missie om complexe processen logisch in te richten en te automatiseren, en dat te vertalen naar heldere, menselijke content — dat is precies waar ik energie van krijg.

In mijn huidige rol als Junior Digital Marketer bij Episto ben ik verantwoordelijk voor on-page SEO, het schrijven van keyword-gerichte blogposts en het beheren van WordPress-sites. Ik werk met tools zoals SEMrush, Ahrefs en Google Search Console om content te optimaliseren en resultaten te meten. Daarnaast heb ik op mijn eigen project mirook.com gestructureerde data (JSON-LD) en GEO-technieken toegepast om de vindbaarheid in zowel traditionele als AI-zoekmachines te verbeteren. Deze ervaring sluit direct aan bij uw vraag naar basiskennis van SEO en GEO.

U zoekt iemand die niet alleen coördineert, maar ook graag zelf uitvoert — schrijven, plannen, produceren. Dat herken ik volledig. Ik haal plezier uit het creëren van content die er echt toe doet, van blogposts tot social media. Ook visuele content maak ik graag; met Canva en basis videobewerking kan ik zelf beelden en video's maken. Daarnaast werk ik vlot met AI-tools om mijn workflow te optimaliseren.

Hoewel mijn Nederlands nog in ontwikkeling is (B1, met lessen), communiceer ik professioneel in het Engels en Turks. Ik ben leergierig, proactief en niet bang om initiatief te nemen. Uw aanbod van externe opleidingen spreekt me dan ook zeer aan.

Ik woon in Zwijndrecht, vlakbij Gent, en ben beschikbaar voor 60% of 80%. Ik kijk ernaar uit om mijn motivatie in een gesprek verder toe te lichten.

Met vriendelijke groet,

Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok

--- English version ---

Dear,

When I read the vacancy for Content Marketeer at Antenna, I felt an immediate connection. Your mission to logically organize and automate complex processes, and to translate that into clear, human content — that is exactly what energizes me.

In my current role as Junior Digital Marketer at Episto, I am responsible for on-page SEO, writing keyword-focused blog posts, and managing WordPress sites. I work with tools like SEMrush, Ahrefs, and Google Search Console to optimize content and measure results. Additionally, on my own project mirook.com, I applied structured data (JSON-LD) and GEO techniques to improve visibility in both traditional and AI search engines. This experience directly aligns with your requirement for basic knowledge of SEO and GEO.

You are looking for someone who not only coordinates but also enjoys executing — writing, planning, producing. I fully recognize that. I take pleasure in creating content that truly matters, from blog posts to social media. I also enjoy creating visual content; with Canva and basic video editing, I can produce images and videos myself. Moreover, I work smoothly with AI tools to optimize my workflow.

Although my Dutch is still developing (B1, with lessons), I communicate professionally in English and Turkish. I am eager to learn, proactive, and not afraid to take initiative. Your offer of external training therefore appeals to me greatly.

I live in Zwijndrecht, close to Ghent, and am available for 60% or 80%. I look forward to explaining my motivation further in a meeting.

Kind regards,

Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok
cv_highlights:
1. SEO & GEO expertise: on-page SEO, structured data, entity optimization, GEO/AEO for AI search visibility
2. Content creation: writing keyword-targeted blog posts, managing WordPress sites, social media integration
3. Analytical skills: using SEMrush, Ahrefs, Google Analytics, Search Console to track and improve content performance
4. Hands-on with AI tools: comfortable using AI to optimize workflow and content
5. Visual eye: experience with Canva, basic video, and responsive web design for social media and web content
tailored_cv:
Baver Ok
Digital Marketing · SEO · GEO · Content · Web
Zwijndrecht, Belgium | +32 470 42 48 36 | baverok@gmail.com | linkedin.com/in/baverok

PROFILE
Junior digital marketer with a technical foundation in web design, SEO, and GEO (Generative Engine Optimization). At Episto, I run on-page SEO, keyword-targeted content, and full-cycle WordPress site build and maintenance for client sites. On my own project (mirook.com) I've applied structured data, entity optimization, and technical SEO/GEO audits to improve visibility across both traditional and AI-powered search engines. Comfortable across content management, social media coordination, and performance reporting; quick to pick up new tools and platforms, and growing into analytics, e-commerce content management, and campaign support. Based in Zwijndrecht, next to Antwerp. Works in English and Turkish; Dutch: B1, currently taking classes to improve further.

CORE SKILLS
- SEO & GEO: on-page SEO, keyword research, technical SEO audits, structured data / JSON-LD schema, entity optimization, GEO & AEO (AI search visibility)
- Content & CMS: SEO blog & content writing, editorial content publishing, website content management, WordPress site building
- Web & build: WordPress, Elementor, Astra theme, responsive web design, Canva, AI-assisted content tools
- Analytics & reporting: Google Analytics, Google Search Console, SEMrush, Ahrefs, Google Ads
- Social: social media content & integration
- Languages: English (professional), Turkish (native), Dutch (B1)

EXPERIENCE

Junior Digital Marketer — Episto (Remote), 2026–present
- Own on-page SEO for client websites, from keyword research to publishing, improving organic visibility and search rankings
- Write keyword-targeted blog content for client websites to grow organic traffic
- Build and maintain client websites in WordPress using Elementor and the Astra theme, including content uploads and page updates
- Track site performance with SEMrush, Ahrefs, Google Analytics, Google Search Console, and Google Ads to guide SEO and content decisions

Warehouse & Logistics — Katoen Natie (Antwerp), 2025–2026
- Maintained accuracy and efficiency in a high-volume, fast-paced logistics environment

Front-End Developer — ViviDoctor (Belgium), 2018–2019
- Developed and optimized front-end features for a healthcare web application (AngularJS, JavaScript)

PROJECTS

mirook.com — Website Design, SEO & GEO (2025–present)
- Designed and built a multi-page WordPress site (Elementor, Astra) for a Belgian youth chess champion: full site structure, on-page SEO, and social media integration (Instagram/Facebook)
- Implemented structured data (JSON-LD schema, including SportsEvent and FAQPage), entity/knowledge-graph markup, and an llms.txt file to improve visibility across traditional and AI-powered search engines (GEO/AEO)
- Ran iterative technical SEO/GEO audits, measurably raising the site's overall search-health score

EDUCATION
- Karel de Grote Hogeschool, Antwerp — Coursework in Applied Computer Science (2022–2025)
- Celal Bayar University, Türkiye — Coursework in Computer Science (2012–2016)
- Diyarbakır Anatolian High School, Türkiye — High School Diploma (2012)

REFERENCES
Available on request.
